en: Well I guess you've got fortune fame power
and status Kind of you know admiration of others Those are the four things that could keep you from God
ko: 그리고 지위가 있지. 타인의 존경. 이 네 가지가 신에게서 멀어지게 하는 거야.

en: I've got fame and fortune I don't know Power status I don't know
Maybe I'll have a go at power next
ko: 명성과 부는 있어. 권력과 지위는 모르겠어.

en: Well fuck it I watch Trump I go fucking we're electing TV hosts now I'll give it a crack
